questions.text: What's one small thing your partner did recently that you never got around to thanking them for?
Which moment together do you replay the most — and what makes it stick?
If the two of you had a completely free day tomorrow, how would you spend it?
When do you feel closest to your partner? What usually makes that happen?
What's something you hope the two of you will do together within a year?
What's one thing you find hard to say out loud to your partner — and what makes it hard?
What has your partner taught you about yourself?
